title: Sight's Vanilla Expanded
description: This QoL mod aims to make Minecraft more consistent, with a large variety of blocks and block variants. It also adds more recipes to vanilla items, while updating some for better consistency.
body:
![vanexp-logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/339174255956bd1cced25d9ae53dadfd9ea8184f.png)

# Features (highlights)
## Blocks
- **New Stairs, Slabs and Walls for 90+ vanilla blocks including:**
  - Terracotta, Stained Terracotta, Concrete, Dirt, Mineral blocks, Deepslate, Sculk, Glowstone and more.
- **Block of Charcoal**
  - Should be pretty self explanatory.
- **Cut Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite Blocks**
  - Used to craft the Cut stairs, slabs and walls.
  - Crafted with 4 of the normal variant.
- **Block of Eyeball**
  - It's more slippery than Blue Ice.
  - Crafted from 9 Eyeballs.
- **Charred Oak Woodset (Planks, Slab, Stairs, Pressure Plate, Button, Door, Trapdoor)**
  - It's very weak, so it breaks when interacted with (including stepping on it).
  - Obtained by smelting any regular planks.
- **New Cracked/Mossy/Chiseled/Normal Brick variants for blocks such as:**
  - Diorite, Andesite, Granite, Dripstone, Calcite, Bricks, Mud Bricks, Red Nether Bricks and Blue Nether Bricks.
- **Rainbow blocks**
  - Crafted using the new Rainbow Dye and any dyeable block (like Wool, Terracotta, Concrete, etc.)
- **Blue Nether Bricks**
  - Comes with Stairs, Slab, Wall, Fence and Fence Gate variants.

## Items
- **Eyeball**
  - Used to craft Blocks of Eyeball.
  - Can be crafted with a Ghast Tear and an Ender Pearl.
- **Banana** (food)
  - Unobtainable in Survival (for now).
- **Burger** (food)
  - Can be crafted with 6 Bread and 3 Steak horizontally.
- **Soul**
  - Can be crafted from Soul Sand or Soul Soil.
  - You can free it by right-clicking on the ground, or when punching mobs.
    - You can also get a little reward by doing it, but will you take the risk?
- **Bedrock Tools**
  - Can insta-mine blocks.
  - Are unbreakable.
  - Can't break Bedrock.

**And too much more to count!**
